Added_Other.name: DFFlagDataStoreEnableModernRequestCounters_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements a modern system for counting data store requests with universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Optimizes data storage and retrieval, enhancing game stability for players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limits for data storage with universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows for more efficient data management, improving game performance and stability.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of data store requests per player based on the game universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of resources, improving game performance for all players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limits for ordered data store reads with universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures more efficient data retrieval for games with large player bases.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data store requests a player can make, filtered by universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data stores and prevents abuse by limiting requests.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limits on data store requests for better management across different game universes.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother data handling, improving game stability and performance.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets limits on how many data removal requests can be made per player.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage and prevents abuse by players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data requests can be made to improve efficiency.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother data saving and loading experiences for players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store writes per player based on universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game stability by managing data requests more effectively.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a fixed limit on the number of requests to a data store.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances game stability by managing how often data can be accessed.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data store listing requests a player can make, adjusted for the universe context.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps players access their data more efficiently while preventing overload on the system.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a fixed limit on how many data store requests can be made per universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage resources across different games.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store read requests per player based on the universe they are in.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance by preventing excessive data requests, ensuring smoother gameplay.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes the fixed limit on requests to data stores for each universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows developers to make more data requests without hitting a limit, improving game performance and player experience.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limit on how many data store removal requests a player can make based on the universe they are in.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to manage their data more freely without hitting request limits, enhancing gameplay experience.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on data store write requests per universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by managing data storage more effectively.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data requests a player can make to the data store.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage, preventing any player from overwhelming the system.

Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and speed of certain operations related to version control in the platform.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are processed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance and speed when displaying time-related data.

Added_Other.name: FFlagFCSendPrimaryCompleteSignal
Added_Other.mechanism: Sends a signal when a primary function completes its task.
Added_Other.purpose: Players receive immediate feedback when important actions finish.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryUsePreFlagMutexForReliabilityCounters
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements a mutex system to ensure reliable tracking of telemetry data.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the accuracy of data collection, leading to better game performance and stability.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string representing the current version of the codebase.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers manage updates and ensure players have the latest features and fixes.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates how timestamps are formatted in dynamic strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players see time-related information in a clearer and more consistent way.
